name: codex-plugin-kimi
description: Run OpenAI Codex review workflows from inside Kimi Code.
skillInstructions: When this plugin asks you to run its helper, prefer the managed plugin path `${KIMI_CODE_HOME:-$HOME/.kimi-code}/plugins/managed/codex-plugin-kimi/scripts/codex-kimi-review.mjs`. The helper is read-only for review lanes by default. Return helper stdout verbatim unless the user asks for a summary.

interface.shortDescription: Codex CLI review workflows inside Kimi Code
interface.longDescription: Run Codex setup checks, quick review, adversarial review, elite/deep/security review prompts, directory review, and background review job management from Kimi Code.
